scene: Teen Byte in late afternoon golden light, having paused from coding to admire his trophy with an ecstatic, hopeful expression

subjects.description: Teen-stage Byte with gangly proportions, big expressive eyes sparkling with happiness, smooth pixel-art contours
subjects.action: leaning back slightly from laptop, looking up at trophy shelf with admiring smile, one hand resting on keyboard, other hand gesturing toward trophy

subjects.description: anchor environment: wooden desk, oversized silver laptop with glowing screen, trophy shelf above desk, Chicago skyline window behind

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette, crisp edges
lighting: warm golden late afternoon light streaming through Chicago window, bright and energetic, soft shadows
mood: ecstatic and proud, hopeful anticipation, satisfied after productive day
background: wooden desk with centered oversized laptop, trophy shelf above with one golden 10-day trophy on left and one green plant on right with clear spacing, food bowl on floor to right with good portions, Chicago skyline visible through window
composition: Byte centered at desk, eye line directed upward toward trophy shelf, balanced framing with window providing depth
